new_terms.context: A technique to accelerate LLM inference using a smaller draft model.
A technique or layer used to predict multiple tokens simultaneously to speed up decoding.
Adding a small number of new tokens to an existing context during a forward pass.
Specific hardware components on the LPX compute tray for memory access.
The hardware enclosure or module housing LPU compute resources.
